corrections.text: The article states that AI News "described" the order as "lightweight" and "non-binding" in quotation marks, implying these are direct words from the AI News article. The AI News source does not use either word. AI News characterizes the order as "not a sweeping regulatory framework" and notes it included "No licensing regime. No mandatory hold periods." The substance of the characterization is accurate and supported by the source, but the specific quoted words were not used by AI News.
